post.description: Creates an ADMIN staff user under Super Admin. The roleId field is the AdminRole ID that controls this staff user's permissions. This endpoint cannot create SUPER_ADMIN, REGISTERED_USER, PROVIDER, or GUEST_USER accounts.

get.description: Admin Roles / RBAC manages permission roles for ADMIN staff users only. SUPER_ADMIN has full immutable access and does not depend on AdminRole permissions.
Read-only list of backend-supported permission keys that can be assigned to admin roles.
REGISTERED_USER only. Lists only contacts owned by the authenticated customer.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Searches name, phone, email, and relationship.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Creates a personal gift contact owned by the authenticated customer. Requires at least one contact method: phone, email, or address.

400.description: At least one contact method is required.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Contact must belong to the authenticated customer.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Updates only contacts owned by the authenticated customer.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Soft deletes only contacts owned by the authenticated customer.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Lists only events owned by the authenticated customer.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. recipientId must belong to the authenticated customer.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Returns marked dates and own events.
REGISTERED_USER only. Defaults to 10 events within 30 days.
REGISTERED_USER only. Event must belong to the authenticated customer.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Event must belong to the authenticated customer.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Event must belong to the authenticated customer.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Event and recipient contact must belong to the authenticated customer.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Soft deletes only own event and cancels pending reminder jobs.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Returns safe marketplace categories, discounted gifts, default address, and upcoming reminder.
REGISTERED_USER only. Returns active categories that have available approved gifts.
REGISTERED_USER only. Reuses marketplace gift filters with offerOnly=true.
REGISTERED_USER only. Brands are derived from approved active provider business names.
REGISTERED_USER only. Only approved, published, active, in-stock gifts from approved active providers are returned. Active offers are calculated by the backend.
REGISTERED_USER only. Hidden/admin-only gift records are never returned.
REGISTERED_USER only. Returns customer-safe available gifts.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Gift must be active, approved, published, and in stock. Duplicate wishlist entries are ignored.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Removes only the current customer wishlist row.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Customers can only view their own non-deleted addresses.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Maintains one default address per customer.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Address must belong to the current customer.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Maintains one default address per customer.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Address is soft deleted and removed from default status.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Clears default flag from all other customer addresses.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Totals are backend calculated from price snapshots.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Removes all items from active cart.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Backend calculates unit price, active offer discount, final price, subtotal, delivery fee placeholder, and total.

patch.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Validates ownership through the active customer cart.

delete.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Deletes only items in the current customer active cart.

post.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Prices are backend-calculated from cart snapshots. Multiple providers are split into provider sub-orders. Payment is COD/placeholder until payment module is ready.

get.description: REGISTERED_USER only. Returns orders owned by the current customer.
REGISTERED_USER only. Order must belong to the current customer.
Public lookup under Gift Categories. Returns active category identifiers and media fields for lightweight selectors.

post.description: RBAC permission: giftCategories.create. Slug is auto-generated and unique. backgroundColor defaults to #F3E8FF; color remains a backward-compatible alias.

get.description: RBAC permission: giftCategories.read. Returns soft-delete-filtered categories with gift counts and category media fields.
RBAC permission: giftCategories.read. Returns admin category inventory counters.
RBAC permission: giftCategories.read. Includes backgroundColor and imageUrl for customer app design support.

patch.description: RBAC permission: giftCategories.update. Slug is regenerated when name changes. Soft-deleted categories are not updated.

delete.description: RBAC permission: giftCategories.delete. Categories with attached gifts cannot be deleted; delete writes an audit log.

get.description: JWT auth. Returns only notifications belonging to the logged-in account. Supports All, Unread, Birthdays, Deliveries, and New Contacts filters. No group gift notifications are supported.
JWT auth. Counts only notifications belonging to the logged-in account.
JWT auth. Preferences belong only to the logged-in account.

patch.description: JWT auth. Push toggle does not delete device tokens. No group gift preference exists.
JWT auth. Marks only notifications belonging to the logged-in account.
patch.summary: Mark all own notifications as read

patch.description: JWT auth. Notification must belong to the logged-in account.

post.description: JWT auth. Supports SEND_GIFT, REMIND_ME_LATER, VIEW_ORDER, VIEW_CONTACT. Group gift actions are not supported.
JWT auth. Token belongs only to logged-in account. Duplicate deviceId updates existing record.

delete.description: JWT auth. Users can disable only their own device tokens.
